chip.label: Order approval with manager review
chip.prompt: When an order comes in, a manager reviews it. Approved orders get fulfilled and the customer is notified. Rejected orders get a notification too.

steps.name: Order received
steps.narration: Placing a Message Start Event — the process triggers when an order arrives.
steps.rationale: Chosen because the prompt describes an external trigger ('when an order comes in'); Message Start Event is the BPMN primitive for externally-initiated processes.

steps.name: Manager reviews order
steps.narration: Adding a User Task for the human review step.
steps.rationale: 'A manager reviews it' implies work performed by a person; User Task is the BPMN primitive for human work.

steps.name: Approved?
steps.narration: Inserting an Exclusive Gateway — one path or the other, not both.
steps.rationale: The prompt contains a binary outcome ('approved … rejected'); Exclusive Gateway routes to exactly one branch.

steps.name: Notify customer
steps.narration: Service Task for the approved-branch notification.
steps.rationale: External system interaction (email / messaging) is implied; Service Task is the integration primitive.

steps.name: Fulfill order
steps.rationale: Fulfilment is a system-to-system handoff — inventory reservation, shipping dispatch — with no human decision point; Service Task is the BPMN primitive for automated work that calls an external system.

steps.name: Fulfilled
steps.narration: End Event closing the approved branch.
steps.rationale: Every path needs a terminal; End Event marks successful completion.

steps.name: Notify rejection
steps.narration: Service Task for the rejection notification.
steps.rationale: Rejection notification, like approval notification, is an automated outbound message to the customer — a Service Task calling an email or messaging system.

steps.name: Rejected
steps.narration: End Event closing the rejected branch.
steps.rationale: Marks the end of the rejection path — the process completes after notifying the customer, with no further routing needed.

resultXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" xmlns:zeebe="http://camunda.org/schema/zeebe/1.0" xmlns:modeler="http://camunda.org/schema/modeler/1.0" id="Definitions_order_approval" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn" exporter="Camunda Modeler" exporterVersion="5.0.0" modeler:executionPlatform="Camunda Cloud" modeler:executionPlatformVersion="8.5.0">
  <bpmn:message id="Message_order_received" name="order.received" />
  <bpmn:process id="Process_order_approval" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_order" name="Order received">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_start_to_review</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:messageEventDefinition id="MessageEventDefinition_1" messageRef="Message_order_received" />
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:userTask id="Task_review" name="Manager reviews order">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:assignmentDefinition assignee="=order.salesRep" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_start_to_review</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_review_to_gateway</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:userTask>
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_approved" name="Approved?" default="Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_review_to_gateway</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_gateway_to_notify_approved</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_notify_approved" name="Notify customer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:taskDefinition type="send-approval-email" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_gateway_to_notify_approved</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_notify_approved_to_fulfill</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_fulfill" name="Fulfill order">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:taskDefinition type="fulfill-order" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_notify_approved_to_fulfill</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_fulfill_to_end_approved</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_approved" name="Fulfilled">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_fulfill_to_end_approved</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_notify_rejected" name="Notify rejection">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <zeebe:taskDefinition type="send-rejection-email" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_notify_rejected_to_end</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_rejected" name="Rejected">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_notify_rejected_to_end</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_start_to_review" sourceRef="StartEvent_order" targetRef="Task_review" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_review_to_gateway" sourceRef="Task_review" targetRef="Gateway_approved" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_gateway_to_notify_approved" name="approved" sourceRef="Gateway_approved" targetRef="Task_notify_approved">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression>=order.approved</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected" name="rejected" sourceRef="Gateway_approved" targetRef="Task_notify_rejected" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_notify_approved_to_fulfill" sourceRef="Task_notify_approved" targetRef="Task_fulfill" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_fulfill_to_end_approved" sourceRef="Task_fulfill" targetRef="EndEvent_approved" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_notify_rejected_to_end" sourceRef="Task_notify_rejected" targetRef="EndEvent_rejected" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="Process_order_approval">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_order_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_order">
        <dc:Bounds x="180" y="182" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="157" y="225" width="82" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_review_di" bpmnElement="Task_review">
        <dc:Bounds x="260" y="160" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Gateway_approved_di" bpmnElement="Gateway_approved" isMarkerVisible="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="405" y="175" width="50" height="50" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="406" y="145" width="48" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_notify_approved_di" bpmnElement="Task_notify_approved">
        <dc:Bounds x="510" y="80" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_fulfill_di" bpmnElement="Task_fulfill">
        <dc:Bounds x="660" y="80" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_approved_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_approved">
        <dc:Bounds x="812" y="102" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="808" y="145" width="44" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_notify_rejected_di" bpmnElement="Task_notify_rejected">
        <dc:Bounds x="510" y="270" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_rejected_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_rejected">
        <dc:Bounds x="662" y="292" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="659" y="335" width="42" height="14" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_start_to_review_di" bpmnElement="Flow_start_to_review">
        <di:waypoint x="216" y="200" />
        <di:waypoint x="260" y="200" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_review_to_gateway_di" bpmnElement="Flow_review_to_gateway">
        <di:waypoint x="360" y="200" />
        <di:waypoint x="405" y="200" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_gateway_to_notify_approved_di" bpmnElement="Flow_gateway_to_notify_approved">
        <di:waypoint x="430" y="175" />
        <di:waypoint x="430" y="120" />
        <di:waypoint x="510" y="120" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected_di" bpmnElement="Flow_gateway_to_notify_rejected">
        <di:waypoint x="430" y="225" />
        <di:waypoint x="430" y="310" />
        <di:waypoint x="510" y="310" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_notify_approved_to_fulfill_di" bpmnElement="Flow_notify_approved_to_fulfill">
        <di:waypoint x="610" y="120" />
        <di:waypoint x="660" y="120" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_fulfill_to_end_approved_di" bpmnElement="Flow_fulfill_to_end_approved">
        <di:waypoint x="760" y="120" />
        <di:waypoint x="812" y="120" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_notify_rejected_to_end_di" bpmnElement="Flow_notify_rejected_to_end">
        <di:waypoint x="610" y="310" />
        <di:waypoint x="662" y="310" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>
